name: Baked Beef & Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a skillet over medium heat. Add ground beef and cook until browned.
2. Drain excess fat from the beef.
3. Stir in rice and chopped onion. Cook for about 5 minutes or until the mixture is well combined.
4. Transfer the mixture to a baking dish.
5. Pour in bacon drippings, salt, pepper, paprika, olives, and tomato juice.
6. Stir to combine all ingredients.
7. Cover the baking dish tightly with aluminum foil.
8. Bake at 300 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 hour.
9. Remove the foil cover and sprinkle shredded Cheddar cheese evenly over the top of the casserole.
10. Continue baking uncovered until the cheese is melted, about 10 more minutes.
SOURCE: Southern Living Magazine, April, 1974.
